item.title: Trump pardons 5 former NFL players for crimes from perjury to drug trafficking
item.description: President Donald Trump has pardoned five former NFL players for crimes that include perjury, counterfeiting and drug trafficking

item.title: Brazilian au pair faces sentencing in scheme to kill lover's wife and another man
item.description: A Brazilian au pair is facing a judge after confessing to scheming with her lover to kill his wife and another man

item.title: Journalist Don Lemon set to be arraigned in Minnesota church protest case
item.description: Former CNN host turned independent journalist Don Lemon is set to be arraigned in federal court in Minnesota on Friday, along with four other defendan...

item.title: Prosecutors move to dismiss charges against men accused of hitting ICE officer with broom and shovel
item.description: Federal prosecutors in Minneapolis have moved to drop felony assault charges against two Venezuelan men, including one shot in the leg by a immigratio...

item.title: Experts say screening tips in Nancy Guthrie's disappearance is 'tremendous' and critical work
item.description: More than 4,000 calls came into an Arizona sheriff's department within 24 hours after the release of videos of a masked person on Nancy Guthrieâs porc...
